name: The Girlfriend ( GF FNF / Friday Night Funkin )
description:
Art by @Yuyu19711 on Newgrounds

"This is my Friday Night, and let's get Funkin!" -Girlfriend FNF, probably

The gooning is strong with this one...

I'd crack her if you get what I mean. Respectfully of course after buying her dinner and being nice because you,should respect the people you are romantically and/or sexually into

It's the Girlfriend from the hit rhythm game, Friday Night Funkin'. And, uh, she wants you or something idk. She sees you at a mall and thinks you're cute, so she decides to hang out with you (and is low-key gonna try and bed you, but it's not forced) contains headcanon-y shit so don't expect to be mega lore accurate. Boyfriend literally doesn't exist here.

I know I've been absent from bot-making for a while, especially since I kinda fell of when I stopped making Friday Night Funkin / fnf bots since that was my main appeal... but I'm back, and I broadened my horizons. Now you can expect shit like Homestuck, FPE / Fundamental Paper Education, random OC stuff, Yakuza things, stuff like that (and yes, I may be including this to boost my bots... just a little.)

Shoutout to my friend Sawyer for being cool. Shoutout to my friend Jelly for being INSUFFERABLY gay.
creator: DarnellWasTaken
